author: Tabitha Cox

We value you as a tenant and look forward to continuing our relationship.

Best regards,

Son-Rise Property Management, Inc.

review: These property managers do not care for their tenants. They did not inform me of mold issues before I moved in, I reported mold issues many times after this. Mold built up in the bedroom closet and window sill, ruining some of my cloths.

review: Janet went out of her way for a lot of things.  Because we spent 15 hours cleaning, we received our deposit back.

author: Grant Rich
review: We have been renting with Son Rise for a year in a 650 sq ft apartment. We always paid our rent on time, never smoked or had pets or had any strange drug party's like just about everyone else in the surrounding areas did.

author: Alison Roll
review: My father in-law was just injured due to son rise refusing to move a vehicle blocking safe and reasonable access to his unit. This vehicle came from another building and street, yet they refused.

ownerResponse.response: Our team wants to extend our sincerest apologies concerning the issues that you have faced. We pride ourselves on maintaining the highest quality standards for our customers we hope you will give us an opportunity to discuss your concerns further with you. You can reach out to us at (360) 738-3700. We hope to find a solution promptly.

author: T Nicole
review: Rented through them for almost three years with no problems. They are quick to fix issues and since we didn't do any damage and left the place clean, we got our full deposit back. Only problem was them raising the rent really high, but that's Bellingham for you.

ownerResponse.response: Hello and thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback! We are thrilled to hear that you have nothing but amazing things to say about our team at Son-Rise Property Management, Inc. and what we offer. Thank you and have a wonderful day!

author: Edwina Gomez
review: Do Not Live At Their Properties!! I have lived all around the country and have never had more complications then with Son Rise, they never did half the things that I asked for. Such as fixing a burner on the stove top, even after I showed management when they visited the house. Be careful!!

ownerResponse.response: Good Afternoon Edwina, I am sorry to hear about your unfortunate experience and anyone at our office would be happy to discuss it with you offline. Here at Son-Rise Property Management we really try to make sure that all of our tenants needs are met. We look forward to hearing from you.

author: Emily Wangsness
review: Son-Rise never responds to their tenants. Multiple requests for maintenance and requests for noise policies to be upheld were completely ignored. Their rent is rising just as fast as rent in the rest of Bellingham, and they refused to pause

ownerResponse.response: We are extremely sorry to hear about this and sorry to disappoint a customer/client. Please reach out to us at (360) 738-3700 as we want to hear your concerns and address them in the most suitable way. We look forward to hearing from you.

author: Amanda Burk
review: Submitted an application over 2 weeks ago and so far have not heard back. Called Son-Rise multiple times since then and were told the processing delay was a result of the pandemic and the company being too busy. Given that people have deadlines to move in and out, we found this management company not professional.

ownerResponse.response: Hello Amanda: Thank you for reaching out. We checked our inbox and files and we could not find an application from you.  Please let us know if you submitted an online application through our website.  You may call us at 360-738-3700 or email at info@son-rise.net. All the best, Son-Rise Property Management

author: Evan Rhodes
review: They lied to me about cleaning my unit after handing me the keys. There were disgusting, crusty stains all over the carpet, smoke damage on the walls, and a disgusting smell coming from my bathroom. I even paid for my own carpet cleaner to finish the mandatory task that they failed to achieve.

review: This review is about Brittany. She is impossible to get a hold of by email or phone call, and the office was closed during business hours when I tried to just drop by

ownerResponse.response: Good morning Sarah: We do not have a Brittany in our office and believe that you have mistaken us with another company. Would you please remove your review as it does not pertain to Son-Rise Property Management.  Thank you for your kind attention to this matter!

They towed and impounded my car that was registered on my lease and parked next

review: This is a horibble company and the BBB needs to be called. They treated former neighbors horribly. Charged for cleaning that never happened (I live next door I saw how long the cleaners were there) and claimed the house was a mess when I

ownerResponse.response: Hi there April,  I am sorry that you feel we charged your friend unfairly.  Here at Son-Rise Property Management we outsource our vendors to keep move-out cleaning and repairs as transparent as possible, and only remove what we were charged from the deposit. We would be happy to discuss any disputed charges with your friend or give a more extensive explanation at the office.

review: called in and asked for the owner because my uncle is a private investor looking for a prop management company.... the receptionist said "FOR WHAT WE HAVE LOTS OF THEM" with the worse attitude and disrespect you could ever encounter. Her

author: Ben Thompson
review: Everyone at Son-Rise was very friendly and quick to answer questions. Sandra was especially helpful. Another bonus was the online maintenance requests which had extremely fast response time. Couldn't ask for a better experience.

ownerResponse.response: Hey there, Ben. We're happy to hear you had an awesome time with us at Son-Rise Property Management, Inc.! Thanks for sharing your experience. We hope you stop by and see us again soon.

review: Only rental company I can say I've had all positive experiences with. Extended my lease and cleaned out my new apartment days early so that I wouldn't have to couch surf between. Always nice and honest about expectations

ownerResponse.response:
Hi Lucas,
Thank you so much for your review.  Here at Son-Rise we strive to exceed expectations of our tenants and owners.

review: Son-Rise is proof that not all property management companies are terrible! Their office staff are professional and kind, and Kandis was absolutely wonderful to work with.

ownerResponse.response: We're grateful to know that your experience with us was an amazing one, and that Kandis was able to take care of your needs! We're always happy to hear appreciation from our customers. We look forward to seeing you again soon at Son-Rise Property Management, Inc.

review: So Son-rise was on top of every maintenance need we had the short time we were there. Kandis is awesome to work with and met all our needs.

review: I wish I could give zero stars. Every time I call and politely try to speak to someone, whoever answers is SO incredibly rude. author: Zach Welch
review: I don't have time to go into how much this company sucks. They treat their tenets like crap. They essentially have long term contracts with big property owners and no accountability because of it. If you have an option, I'm warning you, don't rent from them, or anyone who uses them to manage a property.

review: The property manager is prompt and professional in addressing tenant and landlord concerns  communicating clearly  and providing informative solutions to the satisfaction of both parties.

ownerResponse.response: Thank you Jo for the wonderful review of Son-Rise Property Management, Inc.! We appreciate you taking time to leave your feedback and we look forward to seeing you again soon.

review: My small family had a good experience with Son-Rise. Maintenance was usually prompt, and the employees were always polite and professional.

review: Bunch of turds. Kicked my girlfriend out of her apartment the she had lived in for 4 years with a 20 day notice in the middle of winter. Good business ethics I would say.
